subcodes.first_line: O my God and my Refuge! My safe and sure Stronghold, and my Stay in my afflictions and trials! To Thee I raise
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی و ملاذی و کهف صونی و عونی فی شدائدی و بلائی انی أبسط الیک
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @prayer for unity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
